case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. SALVADOR ELVIRA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED NOV-27-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ELVIRA, SALVADOR
